proposal_summary: Authorize Polygon Labs to deploy Uniswap V3 to the Polygon zkEVM rollup on behalf of the community.

disclosed_entities.name: Polygon Labs
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: We propose to authorize Polygon Labs to deploy Uniswap’s protocol to the Polygon Zero Knowledge Ethereum Virtual Machine rollup known as “zkEVM”

disclosed_entities.name: Polygon Labs Services (Switzerland) AG
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The legal entity that is supporting this proposal is Polygon Labs Services (Switzerland) AG

disclosed_entities.name: Uniswap
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Deploying early on zkEVM helps solidify Uniswap’s place as the number one DEX

claimed_actions.raw_action: Deploy Uniswap V3 protocol to Polygon zkEVM
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Make Uniswap available on an EVM compatible ZK rollup
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: We propose to authorize Polygon Labs to deploy Uniswap’s protocol to the Polygon Zero Knowledge Ethereum Virtual Machine rollup known as “zkEVM” on behalf of the community.

claimed_complexity.reason: Deploys an existing EVM codebase to an equivalent zk-rollup, but involves cross-chain components like arbitrary message passing through bridges.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: As an Ethereum Layer Two, it uses Zero Knowledge proofs to inherit Ethereum’s core safety, while allowing developers to easily deploy existing EVM codebases.

limitations: No explicit contract addresses or technical deployment parameters provided.
